lessons.title: Implement Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL point operations
lessons.content_md:
Write code to create, read, update, and delete items in Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-azure-cosmos-db-sql-api-point-operations/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL point operations

lessons.title: Perform cross-document transactional operations with the Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
lessons.content_md:
Perform operations on multiple items in single logical units of work.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/perform-cross-document-transactional-operations-azure-cosmos-db-sql-api/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Perform cross-document transactional operations with the Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL

lessons.title: Process bulk data in Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
lessons.content_md:
Perform bulk operations on Azure Cosmos DB in bulk from code using the SDK.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/process-bulk-data-azure-cosmos-db-sql-api/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Process bulk data in Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Access and manage data with the Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL SDKs
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Access and manage data with the Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL SDKs**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
